text.title: devops-lb-kubernetes Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for devops-lb-kubernetes as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using Service type LoadBalancer for every HTTP service in a cluster.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Each Service type LoadBalancer provisions a separate cloud LB, multiplying cost and management overhead by the number of services. Use an Ingress controller to consolidate all HTTP/HTTPS traffic behind a single LB.

failure-mode.description: Omitting readiness probes on Deployments with rolling update strategy.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Kubernetes marks pods Ready immediately after the container starts, before the application has initialised. Traffic is routed to unready pods, causing errors during every deployment. Readiness probes gate traffic admission until the application is ready to serve.
